title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — EMEA — Q2 2026
summary: Twenty-one EU markets, the UK, and six Middle Eastern jurisdictions are simultaneously operationalizing comprehensive crypto regulatory frameworks—MiCA Level 2 standards, AMLA's direct supervision authority, and national licensing transitions. The EU alone shows 211 authorized CASPs with 149 non-compliant entities facing enforcement, while France's July 1 PSAN transition deadline and UK's Q3 authorization cutoff create compressed compliance windows.
